name: cdkd-integ-destroy-interrupt
description: Integ fixture for graceful-SIGINT destroy (#816) + Custom-Resource replay fail-fast (#804): VPC + isolated subnets + VPC-attached Lambda-backed Custom Resource + SSM Parameters. A mid-destroy Ctrl-C must drain in-flight deletes, preserve trimmed state, and release the lock; a re-run must resume cleanly with no 10-minute CR stall against the already-deleted backing Lambda.
